name: Yamashita Health Care Holdings,Inc.
summary: Yamashita Health Care Holdings,Inc. engages in the wholesale of medical equipment in Japan. The company is also involved in the medical IT business; and design, construction, and maintenance of equipment. In addition, it offers management consulting support and consumables management logistics services; and manufactures and sells medical instruments and orthopedic implants. The company is based in Fukuoka, Japan.
